curation.synopsis: Fifty years after Hive Fleet Behemoth was thrown back, the realm of Ultramar is secure enough for Marneus Calgar, Chapter Master of the Ultramarines, to make a goodwill tour of the remote colony world of Zalidar. His arrival coincides with a full-scale ork invasion. Calgar's transport is shot from the sky, and with only a handful of Space Marines at his side he must fight across hostile country to reach Zalathras, the besieged colonial capital. There, against a greenskin horde beyond counting, Calgar takes command of the city's defence and holds its gates through a day and a night of relentless slaughter. It is a stand that should be impossible, and from it a legend is forged that will outlast the men who lived it.
